controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (small finance banks- credit cards and debit cards: issuance and conduct) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks-
Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (small finance banks- credit cards and debit cards: issuance and conduct) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to small finance banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to small finance banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as issued
controls.control_description:
These directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to credit, debit and
co-branded cards which shall be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber
security related Directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as issued by the
RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) add-on credit card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary
credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary
cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter, subject to such terms and
conditions as stipulated by the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) add-on credit card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter

identification, linked to a Savings Bank / Current Account which can be used to

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of identification, linked to a savings bank / current account which can be used to withdraw cash, make online payments, do pos terminal / quick respon

controls.control_description:

Each card-issuer shall have a well-documented Board approved policy for the issuance

published/sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and

The MITC shall be provided to the customer

The MITC and copy of the
agreement signed/digitally signed between the card-issuer and cardholder shall be sent
to the registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of
the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of the customer

controls.control_description:

where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover to their cardholders, in tie-up
with insurance companies, the card-issuers shall obtain explicit consent in writing or in
digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s.

controls.control_objective: To ensure only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed
controls.control_description:
In case, an unsolicited
card is issued/existing card upgraded and activated without the explicit consent of the
recipient and the latter is billed for the same, the card-issuer shall not only reverse the
charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to
twice the value of the charges reversed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed

from activating or providing consent for activation of card through OTP or any other
Explanation: (i) Customer-initiated process indicating intent to use a credit card such as

recorded call to the customer care centre and SMS may be considered as activation of
Credit Card.

Card-issuers may issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for

of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id,
Interactive Voice Response (IVR), prominently visible link on the website, internet banking,
